query:
UPDATE resources
            SET resource_name = $1,
                description = $2,
                quantity = $3,
                quantity_unit = $4,
                condition = $5,
                location_geo = CASE
                    WHEN $6::float8 IS NOT NULL AND $7::float8 IS NOT NULL
                    THEN ST_SetSRID(ST_MakePoint($7, $6), 4326)::geography
                    ELSE NULL
                END,
                availability_start = $8,
                availability_end = $9,
                document_urls = $10,
                opportunity_cost = $11,
                verified_by_platform = $12,
                metadata = $13,
                is_active = $14,
                updated_at = $15
            WHERE id = $16
